// 01 — about me

A little about me

I'm passionate about building software that solves real-world problems. My interests lie in Java Full Stack Development, Data Structures & Algorithms, System Design, and Generative AI. I enjoy creating applications that are fast, scalable, and user-focused while continuously learning new technologies and best practices.

Beyond coding, I value teamwork, adaptability, and continuous improvement—qualities that help me grow as both a developer and a problem solver.

I'm always building, always learning, and always looking for the next challenge.

Things I've built

GenAI · Full Stack

Prep Wise — AI Mock Interview Platform

AI-powered mock interview platform where users select a job role, get tailored questions, and receive AI feedback on their responses. Built full-stack including auth, DB, and AI integration.

MongoDBExpress.jsReactNode.jsGenerative AI

Full Stack

Rapid Relief Response System

Disaster and emergency response management system. Users report incidents; authorities manage and track them efficiently. Developed frontend, backend logic, and database integration.
